/* MIT License http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php Author Tobias Koppers @sokra */ "use strict"; module.exports = { /** * @type {Record<string, string>} */ versions: {}, // eslint-disable-next-line jsdoc/reject-function-type /** @param {Function} fn function */ nextTick(fn) { // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-rest-params const args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments, 1); Promise.resolve().then(() => { // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-spread fn.apply(null, args); }); }, };
